/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/TodoListTests.dir/TodoListTests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TodoListTests.dir/test/database/databaseTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TodoListTests.dir/test/manager/managerTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TodoListTests.dir/test/listModel/listModelTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TodoListTests.dir/test/proxyModel/proxyModelTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TodoListTests.dir/test/main.cpp.o -o TodoListTests -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libTodoListCore.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest /opt/homebrew/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers -framework Security -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation -framework IOKit
